title: Croshair switch mod
description: Changes the croshair if u aim at a mob/player
body:
Switches ur croshair when aiming at a player/mob very usefull in pvp.
Mods needed: Fabric api 1.21.10 I only have 1.21.10 but it will be 1.21.11 soon so stay tuned and wait till i have the nerve to rewrite teh code to fit in 1.21.11
